packageRules.description: yt-dlp ships frequent YouTube extractor fixes — never batch or delay it; open its PR immediately. Automerged once the Tests workflow is green. Note: CI validates install + unit tests, not live YouTube extraction; automerge lands it on main, but production only changes on a deliberate release/deploy, so the real-world check still happens at deploy time. platformAutomerge:false lets Renovate merge via API without branch protection.
Group the GitHub Actions bumps so they arrive as one PR.
